name: Bayerische Erdbeercreme (Strawberry Barvarian)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice strawberries and mix with the sugar. Let stand until sugar dissolves.
2. Sprinkle gelatin over cold water. Set aside 5 minutes, then heat gently until gelatin dissolves completely.
3. Add dissolved gelatin and lemon juice to sliced berries.
4. Fold in whipped cream.
5. Pour into a 1-quart mold or serving dish. Chill until set.
6. Carefully unmold and serve.
